gradeLabel: Open weights under a permissive license

ladderVerdict.justification: The license is explicitly identified as 'Apache License Version 2.0', a permissive license that permits commercial use, modification, and distribution provided attribution and license notice are retained.

license.name: Apache 2.0
notAllowed: Remove the Apache 2.0 license or attribution notices
Use the Qwen trademarks without permission
license.scaleTrigger: None (Apache 2.0, no MAU or revenue threshold)
license.commercialNote: Apache 2.0 permits commercial use, modification and redistribution provided attribution and the license notice are retained.

deployment.minHardware: 20 GB VRAM (Q4_K_M) for Qwen3-32B dense variant
deployment.verdict: runs on a single consumer GPU

technical.quantizationImpact: Moving from BF16 (≈2 bytes/param) to GGUF Q4_K_M (≈0.5 bytes/param) reduces VRAM roughly 4‑fold; e.g., Qwen3-32B drops from ~64 GB to ~20 GB, and the MoE 235B‑A22B drops from ~470 GB to ~130 GB.

private.text: Qwen3 is released under the permissive Apache 2.0 license, allowing commercial use, modification, and redistribution. The dense 32B variant fits on a single consumer‑grade 24 GB GPU when quantized to Q4_K_M, enabling offline operation without licensing friction.

enterprise.text: Enterprises can freely deploy Qwen3 commercially under Apache 2.0 with no usage‑based fees or MAU thresholds. Larger MoE variants require multi‑GPU servers but remain free of licensing restrictions; attribution and preservation of the license notice are the only obligations.

nonprofit.text: Non‑profit organizations benefit from the same permissive terms: no cost, no usage limits, and the ability to fine‑tune or derivative works. The model runs offline on modest hardware when quantized, supporting mission‑driven applications.

disagreements: Source 5 (D‑Central) references a Qwen3‑30B‑A3B variant that is not listed in the authoritative facts for the Qwen3 base release; this claim relies on a single P3 source and is unconfirmed for this report.

sources.title: How to choose a Qwen3-8B quantization method: deciding AWQ, GPTQ, FP8, and GGUF by use
